# QoF v1.2.0's Changelog

> [!NOTE]
> A Minecraft Bedrock addon that adds small vanilla-friendly features. Each module is configurable through the in-game pack settings panel. Requires **BetaAPIs** enabled under Experiments.

## Pack Info

Full changelog: [v1.2.0](https://github.com/aitji/QoF/commits/v1.2.0) or [compare](https://github.com/aitji/QoF/compare/v1.1.1...v1.2.0) Releases: [v1.2.0](https://github.com/aitji/QoF/releases/tag/v1.2.0) LICENSE: [MIT](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/aitji/QoF/refs/heads/behavior_packs/LICENSE)\
Release Date: [Mar/18/2026 (19:54:14)](https://time.is/Unix_time_converter/1773863654)

Base Game Version: [26.3](https://feedback.minecraft.net/hc/en-us/articles/43861703542925-Minecraft-Bedrock-Edition-26-3-Changelog)\
Dependency: [2.6.0@beta](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@minecraft/server/v/2.6.0-beta.1.26.3-stable)

# Changelogs

## It's time to move!

We migrated the `manifest.json` from `format_version 2` to `format_version 3`. This gives us access to pack settings, which is an in-game pack configuration system.

- Beta API checker utilizing an mcfunction to send a heartbeat to the script.
- All settings have been migrated to use `pack settings` in the world menu instead of `/toggle [packname]` in-game. This allows runtimes that only need to initialize once, making the addon overall faster.

## README.md has been created!

A README file has been created for the repository homepage with GIF showcases recorded in-game with vibrant visuals and action, created by our contributor @pickerth-12.

## Carried Container

- Carried containers now have more configuration options.

## Bug Fixes

- Light blocks from Dynamic Light will no longer replace lava.
- While a player is holding to repair the anvil, the anvil UI will not open after the repair finishes. The player must click again to open the anvil UI for better UX.

# Pre-release Changelogs (v1.1.x)

All updates from pre-releases are included in the v1.2.0 release.

<details>
  <summary><strong>v1.1.1 <a href="https://github.com/aitji/QoF/releases/tag/v1.1.1">Take me there</a></strong></summary>

## v1.1.1

### Configs Update!

- `scripts/_config.js` now heavily uses `Object.freeze(...)`

### Carrying Container

- Add `qof:chest` entity to temporarily store container
- Add `scripts/addon/chest.js` to allow players to pick up _any container_

### Anvil Repairing

- Anvil now has `permCache` to cache block states for reuse.
- Anvil has more edge case handling (e.g. roll back when item removal failed)
  > _TL;DR_ optimization & edge case

### Composter+

- Vanilla Composter now supports hoppers and can compost more items from our list while staying vanilla-friendly.
- Composter code has been further optimized

### Dynamic Light

- Armor Stands holding items are marked as not working [api limitation](https://github.com/aitji/QoF/blob/behavior_packs/README.md?plain=1#L435)
  > `README.md` is not updated in this version, Here is a phrase
  > "... - `Limitations` Armor Stands do not support the equippable component in the current API. Items held by armor Stands do not emit dynamic light only item frames are supported for static placed sources. ..."

behavior_packs changes:

- Capitalized names
- Added "Slab" and proper block names
- Fixed plural blocks like "Bricks", "Tiles", "Planks"
- Slight wording improvement in the description

### Recipe+

Double slabs can be crafted back into their corresponding blocks by stacking two slabs on top of each other.

| Slabs                          | Blocks                     |
| ------------------------------ | -------------------------- |
| Smooth Stone Slab              | Smooth Stone               |
| Stone Slab                     | Stone                      |
| Cobblestone Slab               | Cobblestone                |
| Mossy Cobblestone Slab         | Mossy Cobblestone          |
| Mossy Stone Brick Slab         | Mossy Stone Bricks         |
| Cut Sandstone Slab             | Cut Sandstone              |
| Smooth Sandstone Slab          | Smooth Sandstone           |
| Cut Red Sandstone Slab         | Cut Red Sandstone          |
| Smooth Red Sandstone Slab      | Smooth Red Sandstone       |
| Granite Slab                   | Granite                    |
| Polished Granite Slab          | Polished Granite           |
| Diorite Slab                   | Diorite                    |
| Polished Diorite Slab          | Polished Diorite           |
| Andesite Slab                  | Andesite                   |
| Polished Andesite Slab         | Polished Andesite          |
| Brick Slab                     | Brick Block                |
| Red Nether Brick Slab          | Red Nether Bricks          |
| End Stone Brick Slab           | End Stone Bricks           |
| Smooth Quartz Slab             | Smooth Quartz              |
| Prismarine Slab                | Prismarine                 |
| Dark Prismarine Slab           | Dark Prismarine            |
| Prismarine Brick Slab          | Prismarine Bricks          |
| Blackstone Slab                | Blackstone                 |
| Polished Blackstone Brick Slab | Polished Blackstone Bricks |
| Polished Deepslate Slab        | Polished Deepslate         |
| Deepslate Tile Slab            | Deepslate Tiles            |
| Deepslate Brick Slab           | Deepslate Bricks           |
| Polished Tuff Slab             | Polished Tuff              |
| Mud Brick Slab                 | Mud Bricks                 |
| Bamboo Mosaic Slab             | Bamboo Mosaic              |
| Oak Slab                       | Oak Planks                 |
| Spruce Slab                    | Spruce Planks              |
| Birch Slab                     | Birch Planks               |
| Jungle Slab                    | Jungle Planks              |
| Acacia Slab                    | Acacia Planks              |
| Dark Oak Slab                  | Dark Oak Planks            |
| Mangrove Slab                  | Mangrove Planks            |
| Cherry Slab                    | Cherry Planks              |
| Pale Oak Slab                  | Pale Oak Planks            |
| Crimson Slab                   | Crimson Planks             |
| Warped Slab                    | Warped Planks              |

> **Note**
> If a block is not listed here, it may already have a vanilla recipe or may not yet be included in this datapack version (26.3).

</details>
